name: Apple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Cream together the butter, sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Add flour and beat in thoroughly.
4. Spread the mixture evenly in the bottom of a greased springform pan, about 1 1/2 inches up the sides.
5. Blend the cream cheese, remaining vanilla, and sugar until smooth.
6. Pour this over the crust.
7. Beat the egg separately.
8. Mix the remaining ingredients (diced apples, sugar) with the egg.
9. Place this mixture on top of the cream cheese layer.
10. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
11. Bake for 10 minutes at 450 degrees F.
12. Lower the temperature to 400 degrees F and bake for an additional 25 minutes.
13. Do not remove the springform ring until the cake has set overnight and is well combined.
14. Run a knife around the side of the pan while cooling to prevent sticking.
